fmiModelDescription.description: Leading-edge strake and cropped-delta wing sized to F-16 Block 50 geometry with 9g capability. This model includes the control system

ScalarVariable.name: direction_command.roll_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Mission-computer command bus input. Desired change in speed vector

ScalarVariable.name: direction_command.pitch_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Mission-computer command bus input. Desired change in speed vector

ScalarVariable.name: direction_command.yaw_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Mission-computer command bus input. Desired change in speed vector

ScalarVariable.name: flight_speed.airspeed_mps
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flight_speed.energy_state_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flight_speed.angle_of_attack_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flight_speed.climb_rate
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flight_speed.health_code
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: actuation_command.left_aileron_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Actuation commands, sent to environment to track and calculate new position

ScalarVariable.name: actuation_command.right_aileron_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Actuation commands, sent to environment to track and calculate new position

ScalarVariable.name: actuation_command.elevator_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Actuation commands, sent to environment to track and calculate new position

ScalarVariable.name: actuation_command.rudder_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Actuation commands, sent to environment to track and calculate new position

ScalarVariable.name: actuation_command.flaperon_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Actuation commands, sent to environment to track and calculate new position
